sections.paragraph:
διάφαυμα, ατος, τό (fr. IV a.d. in patr., s. Lampe; fr. VI a.d. in pap) daybreak GJs 23:3.

  1. fr. = from

patr. patr. = patristic, patristic writings

Lampe Lampe = GL. ed., A Patristic Greek Lexicon—List 6

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 239
